sites.name: FIRE API
sites.stack: CF Worker: fire-api (GitHub: fire-intel/workers/api/) — daily cron 0 12 * * *
sites.description: Backend API powering fire.stluker.com. Claude via CF AI Gateway (fire-intel-gateway) with cost controls. Supabase for signal persistence. Rate-limited manual refresh endpoint.
features: Claude Sonnet via CF AI Gateway: fire-intel-gateway
web_search tool with max_uses:2 cap (hard cost ceiling)
2 retries max (down from 3 — reduces search budget blowout)
30-min KV rate limit on /api/refresh/:token (prevents manual trigger abuse)
Cost ceiling: ~$0.12/day worst case (6 calls × 2 searches)
/api/health endpoint for KV + Supabase status check
sites.automation: Daily cron 0 12 * * * — 1 of 5 CF cron slots consumed
openTasks: Monitor CF AI Gateway logs for cache hit rate
Verify CF_AIG_TOKEN secret wired (authenticated gateway)

recentActivity.event: Cross-link nav updated — music.stluker.com added to all three sites (stluker.com, family, sports)
stl.stluker.com launched — STL Bucket List beehiiv newsletter auto-ingestion via CF cron + Claude Haiku + Supabase
Supabase keepalive fixed — Bearer auth added to cron-job.org request (was silently failing)
stluker.com food pulse upgraded — v5 Edge Function with structured JSON output, DM Sans font, improved contrast
music.stluker.com launched — STL/Music live events tracker (concerts, comedy, theater) with Ticketmaster API
DMARC diagnosed — p=none monitoring working correctly; null SPF on root domain recommended
status.stluker.com launched — Jira-inspired ecosystem dashboard; data.json separated from fire-intel
Davidson feedback mapped — Paul's Pick badge deployed across all sites; pokelab + iron-rails source recovered to GitHub
Supabase keepalive Worker deployed — cron-job.org daily ping to supabase-keepalive.pdluker.workers.dev
Cross-link nav added — stluker.com ↔ family.stluker.com ↔ sports.stluker.com (top banner + footer)
sports.stluker.com fully wired — stl-sports Worker, SPORTS_KV, ESPN + iCal feeds, rivalry watch
